note: This is the last-known IMD alert. Live RSS feed was unavailable at time of retrieval.

alerts.headline: Heavy to Very Heavy Rainfall Warning for Ernakulam district
alerts.detail: IMD issues Orange Alert for Ernakulam, Kerala. Heavy to very heavy rainfall (115.6–204.4 mm) expected in the next 24 hours. Strong winds (40–50 kmph) likely. Low-lying areas near Periyar and Muvattupuzha rivers prone to waterlogging. Avoid river banks and flood-prone zones.

alerts.headline: Moderate Rainfall Advisory for Mumbai
alerts.detail: IMD Yellow Alert for Mumbai Metropolitan Region. Moderate rainfall (15–64.5 mm) expected over next 12 hours. Some waterlogging possible in low-lying suburban areas. Citizens advised to avoid travel during peak rain hours.

alerts.headline: Extremely Heavy Rainfall — Red Alert for Guwahati and Kamrup
alerts.detail: IMD Red Alert: Extremely heavy rainfall (>204.4 mm) expected in Kamrup Metropolitan and adjoining districts. Brahmaputra tributaries (Bharalu, Basistha) may exceed danger mark. Evacuation advisories active for riverside settlements. Avoid all movement near embankments.

alerts.headline: Heavy Rainfall Warning for Bhubaneswar and Khordha
alerts.detail: IMD Orange Alert for Khordha district. Heavy to very heavy rainfall expected. Urban flooding likely in low-lying wards. Municipal drainage may be strained. Citizens advised to keep emergency kits ready.

alerts.headline: Light to Moderate Rainfall Advisory for Chennai
alerts.detail: IMD Yellow Advisory for Chennai and surrounding districts. Light to moderate rainfall expected. No immediate threat of major flooding. Monitor local alerts.
